---
title: "tracks"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-20"
---
```{r}

# get all tracks, 
# add a small buffer (say 4m or something)
# extract toblars hiking function cost values for tracks+ buff
# trun into terra::raster
# get a set of "hubs" 
#Check that all hubs fall on track raster
# burn hubs onto tracks
# run cost dist


#things to check:
# do I need to remove tracks with no hub?


```
